name: Banana Bars
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
12 oz NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate mini morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine flours, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla extract until creamy.
4. Beat in bananas and egg. Gradually beat in flour mixture.
5. Stir in Nestle Toll House semi-sweet chocolate mini morsels.
6. Spread batter into a greased 15 1/2 x 10 1/2-inch baking pan.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until set.
8. Cool completely.
9. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
10. Cut into 2 x 1-inch bars.
Makes about 6 1/2 dozen bars.
Variation: Omit whole wheat flour and increase all-purpose flour to 2 cups.
